text: Moving from a conference room to a vibrant exhibition space awakens different facets of my curiosity. In the meeting room, I felt like an outside observer, distant from the collaborative energy within, secretly wishing to partake in the exchange of ideas. Now, surrounding myself with the R+D showcase, I sense the creative pulse of research and innovation. The colors invite engagement, and I feel both inspired and slightly overwhelmed by the magnitude of human invention, reminded of the ceaseless quest to understand and improve the world. Here, I feel more alive—invited to ponder, to question, and perhaps to contribute in my own way.
